name: TDD-SUBAGENT-BACKLOG-13
title: Remove dead auto_close_backlog legacy-local-backlog path and vacuous test; relocate cross-scope SKILL.md tests to rabbit-feature
description:
Two related cleanups:

1. auto_close_backlog in tdd-step.py:175-237 scans .claude/backlogs/<feature>/<ID>/item.json which does not exist post-rabbit-file unification (backlog items moved to bug-backlog-files branch). The only test (test-RABBIT-CAGE-BACKLOG11-auto-close-backlog.py) deliberately omits item-status.py from the mirror so the function returns early — proving nothing about actual close behavior. Delete the legacy local-backlog scan path (lines 175-237) along with the now-orphan _head_sha helper and the vacuous test file (114-243 lines of test pretending to test the real behaviour). Keep only the rabbit-file unified storage path (via item-status.py).

2. Multiple tests in tdd-subagent/test/ read and assert on rabbit-feature-owned SKILL.md content (Cycle B moved that surface). Per philosophy.md §2 (bounded scope) and tdd-subagent's contract.md reads.files (which does NOT list rabbit-feature artifacts), these are contract-violating cross-scope reads. Move the following tests to rabbit-feature/test/: test-rabbit-feature-touch-skill-v3.py, test-rabbit-feature-touch-seven-step.py, test-skill-invocation-and-rabbit-report-path.py, test-confirm-token-bypass-section.py, test-bypass-marker-skill-doc.py, test-rabbit-feature-touch-item-json.py, test-commit-gaps-fix.py, test-wave5-cleanup.py, test-skill-md-routing-and-main-session-red-flags.py.

3. Also drop the duplicate Cycle-B re-home assertion files: test-rabbit-feature-touch-skill-ownership.py and test-cycle-b-skill-rehomed.py (one should subsume the other).

4. Also drop pt2/pt3 of test-post-transition.py (testing absence of an already-absent reference).
